title: Create a user that does NOT have an email address
excerpt: I would like to setup a team of telemarketing agents that do not have an email address as users. Is there a way to create a user name without an email?

posts.author: ComOps (Robert Levine)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to setup a team of telemarketing agents that do not have an email address as users. Is there a way to create a user name without an email?
